description: Parity for the 4 batch tools. Fixture: the same 5-function diamond used by reachability/centrality so batched queries can be cross-checked against single-call equivalents.

cases.name: five_paths
cases.parity_invariant: CLI list (in input order) == MCP `infos` array

cases.name: five_paths
cases.parity_invariant: Result has one entry per input, in input order

cases.name: from_a_and_b
cases.parity_invariant: Same as union of get_reachable from each seed; seed paths excluded

cases.name: to_d_and_e
cases.parity_invariant: Same as union of get_reachable_to from each seed

diamond_call_graph.description: Shared with reachability and centrality Skills — 5-function diamond.
